properties.value: { "action": "Layout", "graphDepth": 1, "includeElementType": [], "includeRelationType": [], "layoutReversed": [ "realization-relationship", "serving-relationship" ], "layoutNested": [], "layoutCircular": true, "graphDirection": "LR", "ranker": "network-simplex", "nodeWidth": 350, "nodeHeight": 25, "hSep": 15, "vSep": 180, "debug": false, "excludeFromView": false, "viewName": "Samenhang archief en actief openbaarmaken", "graphAlign": "DR", "viewNameSuffix": "", "viewFolder": "" }
